results.name: synergy-pw-choose
results.description: Effects that let you choose which planeswalker type they apply to.

results.name: synergy-solo-attack
results.description: Cards that care about attacking with only one creature

results.name: synergy-surveil
results.description: Beneficial effects for the Surveil keyword.

results.name: synergy-tapped
results.description: Effects that care about your tapped permanents. For cards that care about something *becoming* tapped, see [uninspired](uninspired). For cards that care about being tapped themselves, see [tapped matters-self](tapped-matters-self).

results.name: synergy-untapped
results.description: Effects that care about other untapped permanents. For cards that care about the *action* of untapping a permanent, see [inspired](inspired). For permanents that care about being untapped themselves, see [untapped matters-self](untapped-matters-self).

results.name: synergy-vanilla
results.description: Synergizes with creatures that have no abilities.
